directive: For ordinary UI copy and localization work, do not hand-edit generated non-English locale bundles under ui/src/i18n/locales/*.ts or ui/src/i18n/.i18n/*; update ui/src/i18n/locales/en.ts or generator/runtime wiring, then run pnpm ui:i18n:sync.
rationale: The UI guide identifies foreign-language locale bundles as generated output and makes English strings plus the i18n generator/runtime wiring the source of truth. Manual edits to generated locales create drift from the maintained sync pipeline.

source_evidence.quote: Foreign-language locale bundles in `ui/src/i18n/locales/*.ts` are generated output. Do not hand-edit non-English locale bundles or `ui/src/i18n/.i18n/*` unless a targeted generated-output fix is explicitly requested.
